info.title: Blog Backend API
info.description: Laravel 10 API for authentication, profile updates, blog publishing, image uploads, notifications, comments, taxonomy, and admin management. Authenticated routes use Laravel Sanctum bearer tokens.

get.description: Returns a small response that confirms the API process is reachable.

post.description: Creates an author account and returns a bearer token.
Authenticates an existing user and returns a bearer token.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile fields. Password changes require current_password. Role and status are admin-managed only.

post.description: Revokes the current Sanctum access token.

get.description: Returns notifications for the authenticated user. Published posts create notifications for active admin and author accounts.

parameters.name: unread
parameters.description: When true, returns unread notifications only.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's unread notification count.

patch.description: Marks all unread notifications for the authenticated user as read.
Marks one notification owned by the authenticated user as read.

get.description: Returns published blogs only. Supports search, category, tag, and pagination filters.

post.description: Creates a blog for the authenticated author. Use multipart/form-data when uploading cover_image.

get.description: Returns a published blog by slug or numeric id. Draft and archived posts are not returned by the public endpoint.

put.description: Updates a blog owned by the authenticated author.

patch.description: Partially updates a blog owned by the authenticated author.

delete.description: Deletes a blog owned by the authenticated author.

get.description: Returns approved comments for a blog.

post.description: Submits a pending comment. Guest comments require author name and email.

get.description: Returns the authenticated author's blogs across all statuses.

patch.description: Updates a comment status for a blog owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a comment for a blog owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns admin dashboard counts for users, blogs, comments, categories, and tags.

post.description: Creates an author or admin user from the admin area.

get.description: Returns a user profile with counts and recent activity.

patch.description: Updates profile fields, password, or role for a user.

delete.description: Deletes another user and revokes their tokens. The authenticated admin cannot delete their own account.

get.description: Returns paginated blogs authored by the user and comments submitted by the user.

parameters.name: blogs_page
parameters.description: Page number for the user's blogs.

parameters.name: comments_page
parameters.description: Page number for the user's comments.

patch.description: Updates only the user's role. The API rejects updates that would remove the final active admin.
Suspends or reactivates a user. Suspending a user revokes their tokens and blocks future login.

get.description: Returns blogs across all statuses for admin review.

post.description: Creates a blog for the authenticated admin or for a selected user_id. Use multipart/form-data when uploading cover_image.

get.description: Returns a blog across any status with author, category, tags, comments, and comment count.

delete.description: Deletes any blog as an admin action.

patch.description: Sets a blog status to draft, published, or archived.
Moderates any comment as an admin action.

put.description: Legacy alias for PUT /blogs/{blog}; send id in the request body.

post.description: Legacy alias for DELETE /blogs/{blog}; send id in the request body.

PerPage.name: per_page
PerPage.description: Items per page. Values are clamped from 1 to 50.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication failed or bearer token is missing.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated user is not allowed to perform this action.

ProfileUpdateRequest.description: Send only the profile fields being changed. Role and status cannot be changed through this endpoint.

cover_image.description: Uploaded cover image file. Accepted types: jpg, jpeg, png, webp, gif. Maximum size: 5 MB.

user_id.description: Author user id. If omitted, the authenticated admin becomes the author.

description.example: Technical articles and backend design notes.
